headerDescription: Invite moderators and admins, manage staff roles, and track pending invitations.
emptyStaffDescription: Send an invite to add your first team member.
emptyInvitesDescription: Pending and completed invitations will appear here.
confirmSuspendDescription: Suspend {name}? They will not be able to sign in until the account is activated again.
confirmActivateDescription: Activate {name}? They will be able to sign in again.
revokeDescription: Revoke the invite for {email}? The link will stop working immediately.

inviteModal.title: Invite staff member
inviteModal.description: Send a secure invite link. They will set a password and enroll two-factor authentication before signing in.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

toast.inviteResentMessage: A fresh invite link was emailed.
toast.inviteRevokedMessage: The invite link can no longer be used.
